description: Slice S2 (FGAP-029): record an install BASELINE at install/accept-all — installed_from (catalog ref) + catalog_version + per-asset content_hash in config.json — the merge-base (git %O analog) primitive shared by catalog re-sync (S3/S4) and the git-merge engine (FGAP-004). No behavior change to existing reads. Per DEC-0010: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + usage-only docs.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Slice S2/4 of DEC-0010 | independent of S1 | the shared merge-base primitive
